content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.cloud.aws_manager
FILE: cosmos/integration/cloud/aws_manager.py (630 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos AWS Manager

"Good news, everyone! I can manage your AWS infrastructure!"

Comprehensive AWS management for sysadmins.

Capabilities:
- EC2 instance management
- IAM user and role management
- S3 bucket operations
- VPC and networking
- CloudWatch monitoring
- Cost exploration
- Security Hub 

CLASSES:
- AWSAuthMethod(Enum): AWS authentication methods.
- EC2State(Enum): EC2 instance states.
- AWSConfig: AWS configuration.
- EC2Instance: EC2 instance representation.
- IAMUser: IAM user representation.
- S3Bucket: S3 bucket representation.
- AWSManager: Comprehensive AWS management.

Prerequisites:
1. AWS account
2. IAM user or role
  Methods: def authenticate(self) -> bool
  Methods: def list_instances(self, filters: List[Dict]=None, instance_ids: List[str]=None) -> List[EC2Instance
  Methods: def start_instances(self, instance_ids: List[str]) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: def stop_instances(self, instance_ids: List[str], force: bool=False) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: def reboot_instances(self, instance_ids: List[str]) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: def terminate_instances(self, instance_ids: List[str]) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: def get_instance_status(self, instance_ids: List[str]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
  Methods: def list_users(self, path_prefix: str='/') -> List[IAMUser]
